name: Thermonuclear-Reactor-Erekir
author: CypokOriginal
description:
This mod adds a variety of nuclear physics features, from beryllium decay to helium to a fusion reactor that can explode and completely destroy your factory! Created as an experiment to test the capabilities of neural networks, this mod was generated entirely by neural networks. The code and all logic were generated by the DeepSeek neural network, and the textures were generated using Nano Banana 2 and Seedream 5.0.
 Этот мод добавляет множество вещей из ядерной физики, от распада бериллия на гелий до термоядерного реактора, который может взорваться и полностью уничтожить ваш завод! Мод сделан ради эксперемента для проверки возможностей нейросетей, этот мод был полностью сгенерирован нейросетями. Код и вся логика были сгенерированы нейросетью DeepSeek, текстуры были сгенерированы благодаря Nano Banana 2 и Seedream 5.0.
 这款模组添加了多种核物理特性，从铍衰变到氦，再到可能爆炸并彻底摧毁你工厂的聚变反应堆！该模组最初是作为一项测试神经网络能力的实验而创建的，完全由神经网络生成。代码和所有逻辑均由 DeepSeek 神经网络生成，纹理则使用 Nano Banana 2 和 Seedream 5.0 生成

Shows hp bars over nearest ally and enemy from cursor in a radius.

Can be changed here:
- `Main Menu -> HP Bars Config`
    - Show Friendly HP Bars: Show hp bars over allies.

    - HP Bar Cursor Radius: Radius in which hp bars are shown.
    - Friendly Color: Color of friendly hp bars.
    - Enemy Color: Color of enemy hp bars.

body:
## Mobile Mapshot Reborn
This project is an updated and optimized version of the original **Mobile Mapshot** mod, ensuring full compatibility with **Mindustry V8 (v146+)**.
### 🛠 Modification Credits
This mod has been significantly improved and updated by **Jassem**.
All core logic has been refined to work seamlessly with the latest game engine changes, specifically for mobile users.
### 🌐 Internationalization
The mod now supports multiple languages for a better global experience:
 * **English** (Default)
 * **Russian** (Русский)
 * **Ukrainian** (Українська)
 * **Japanese** (日本語)
### 🚀 Features
 * **Full Map Capture:** Take high-resolution screenshots of the entire map on mobile devices.
 * **V8 Optimization:** Specifically tuned for performance on version 157.4+.
 * **Memory Management:** Includes a toggle to check memory safety before rendering large maps.
 * **Clean UI:** Simple, classic interface integrated directly into the game settings.
### 📂 Storage
All captured images are saved in the screenshots folder within your Mindustry data directory.
*Original mod by Mythril. Reborn and maintained by Jassem.*

name: LiquiDustry
author: StrawbreeCake
description: Transport liquids with drones!
body:
![logo](assets/icons/liquidustry-titlecard.png)

# LiquiDustry - a fluidic mod for Mindustry, the RTS game

The Java Mindustry mod template that works on Android and PC can be found [here](https://github.com/Anuken/MindustryJavaModTemplate).

## What's in this mod?

Well, right now it's just item-liquid transmografication. Turn any vanilla liquid into a gelled state, then turn it back again!

"Why would I do that?"

I'm glad you asked: DRONES!

## What's next?

This is my first foray into java and mod-making, so I can't promise quick results. :P
I hope to add proper liquid drones and mass drivers, as well as cool turrets and units! (Firefighting aircraft, anyone?) I also think that a unit-focused mod without turrets would be interesting.

Installation:
* Open "mods" in game
* Open "import from GitHub"
* Write: StrawbreeCake/LiquiDustry

![Signoff.](assets/icons/StrawbreeCake-Mini.png)

name: faster-and-smarter-unloader
author: Foxelling
description: Makes unloaders faster (180 items/sec) and smarter. They now exclusively push raw materials into factories and pull finished products out, completely preventing infinite transfer loops.
body:
# Faster and Smarter Unloader

A mod that makes Unloaders significantly faster and much smarter.

## Features
* **High Throughput:** Unloader speed is increased to 180 items per second.
* **Smart Factory Logic:** Unloaders no longer bounce items back and forth between storages and factories. They correctly push raw materials *into* the factory, and exclusively pull *finished products* out.
* **Anti-Looping:** Prevents infinite loop transfers between Storage blocks and Transportation blocks (e.g., Plastanium conveyors), fixing item flow issues.
